ogTitle: Jane Brook vs Jarrahdale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Jane Brook and Jarrahdale.
heading: Jane Brook vs Jarrahdale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jane Brook, Western Australia and Jarrahdale, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jarrahdale has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Jane Brook (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jane Brook or Jarrahdale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jane Brook has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Jarrahdale scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jane Brook scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Jarrahdale scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jane Brook or Jarrahdale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jarrahdale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
